overview: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KIIT), Bhubaneswar, is a top-tier private deemed university recognized for its strong placement performance, global research rankings, modern infrastructure, and professional education across engineering, management, law, and sciences. KIIT has been granted the status of 'Institute of Eminence' by the Government of India.
accreditation: Institute of Eminence (Government of India); NAAC A++ Accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹4,00,000 – ₹10,40,000 total tuition. Approximate total cost including hostel: ₹18.01 Lakhs.

placements.avgSalary: B.Tech: ~₹8.50 LPA; MBA: ~₹9.00 – ₹9.50 LPA; Law: ~₹5.00 LPA
placements.totalOffers: Near 100% placements for eligible students across major professional schools
placements.companiesVisited: Infosys, Deloitte, Accenture, Capgemini, Amazon, Microsoft, IBM, Tata Power

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on KIITEE entrance examination and national-level entrance exams depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules and counseling timelines are announced annually on the official KIIT admissions portal.

campus.area: Large integrated urban campus in Bhubaneswar
campus.specialNote: Hostel charges range from ₹39,000 to ₹1,15,000 annually depending on room type. Mess fee is approximately ₹45,000 per year. Combined hostel and mess charges typically range between ₹85,000 and ₹1,60,000 annually.

details: KIITEE Merit Scholarship: Top 1000 rank holders may receive tuition fee waivers or ₹10,000 monthly stipend.
Pradyumna Bal Memorial Scholarship: Free education including hostel and mess for meritorious students from economically weaker backgrounds.
Monthly fellowships available for full-time Ph.D. scholars.

contact.address: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KIIT), Patia, Bhubaneswar – 751024, Odisha, India
